reason: B4: Compared Population (1292) with GDP per capita (5) — unit-incompatible. No clean replacement on p11; dropping. Recommend new IPCC numeric seed from a uniform-units table elsewhere (e.g., Table 3.1 emissions pathways).

original.question: Based on the table on page 11, for column "Africa", what is the percentage change from row "Population (million persons, 2019)" (1292) to row "GDP per capita (USD1000PPP 2017 per person) 1" (5)?
